message:
feat(fsqlite-wal): implement WAL header parsing, frame I/O, and index header types

Major expansion of the WAL crate with ~1200 lines of new functionality:

checksum.rs:
- WAL magic constants (LE/BE checksum modes) and format version
- WalHeader: parsed 32-byte WAL header with magic, page size, salts,
  and checksum validation
- WalFrameHeader: parsed 24-byte frame header with page number,
  commit-size marker, and salt/checksum fields
- WalReader: streaming frame iterator over a WAL file with checksum
  chain verification and salt continuity checks
- WalWriter: append-only frame writer with automatic checksum chaining,
  salt rotation on new WAL segments, and header serialization

wal_index.rs:
- WAL-index header constants (version, size, lock slots, reader marks)
- WalIndexHdr: parsed 48-byte SHM header with format version, change
  counter, page count, checksum pairs, and salt/cksum fields
- WalCkptInfo: checkpoint coordination region with nBackfill counter,
  reader marks array, lock states, and write-starvation counter
- Header validation, endianness detection, and consistency checks

lib.rs:
- New WalMode enum and configuration types for WAL behavior control
- Updated re-exports for the expanded public API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
